creator: oleksii.tsai@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to oleksii.tsai from comment #2)

Took a second look at your log, there is an error saying it could find g-ir-scanner executable,which is vended by g-object-introspection package. I would take a guess that you don't have it installed at all, or it is broken.
Also it sounds like dependencies for libgsf are broken as well.
